moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships enter their crucial second week, culminating in the finals on July 11th and 12th.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Who's making it to the final weekend at Wimbledon? The tension is building as the championships head into their second week!

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Can a Brit go all the way at Wimbledon this year? We're glued to every match as the finals approach.

moments.title: Tour de France Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on Saturday, July 4th, with the Grand Départ in Barcelona, Spain.

angles.name: Pedal to the Metal
angles.copy: The greatest race on two wheels is back! The Tour de France starts this Saturday in Barcelona. Who's your pick for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Grand Départ Excitement
angles.copy: Three weeks of gruelling climbs and sprint finishes begin this weekend as the Tour de France gets underway. Get ready for some epic cycling!

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days on Sunday, July 12th, leading up to the main tournament.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale next week for The Open! Practice days kick off Sunday. Who's got their eye on the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Birkdale Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for links golf at its finest! The Open Championship practice rounds start Sunday. It's going to be an epic week in Southport.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the Official UK Singles Chart number one for the week ending July 2, 2026, marking its 14th non-consecutive week at the top.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Another week, another number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is back at the top of the UK Singles Chart. What a track!

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean just hit #1 for its 14th non-consecutive week! This song is truly unstoppable. Tune in to hear it!

moments.title: Happy 43rd Birthday Michelle Branch
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'All You Wanted', turns 43 today.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to the incredible Michelle Branch! From 'Everywhere' to 'Breathe', her songs are timeless. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Still Everywhere
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Branch's 43rd birthday today! Her early 2000s anthems still sound as good as ever. Send her some birthday love!

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday Monie Love
moments.blurb: British rapper Monie Love, a pioneer in UK hip hop and known for her work with Native Tongues, turns 56 today.

angles.name: UK Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Big up to the legendary Monie Love, celebrating her 56th birthday today! A true icon of UK hip hop and the Native Tongues crew.

angles.name: Pioneering Rapper
angles.copy: Happy 56th to the trailblazing Monie Love! Her influence on rap and dance music is undeniable. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent, born Curtis Jackson, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Get ready to party like it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your go-to track from the hip hop mogul?

angles.name: Hip Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Celebrating 50 Cent's 51st birthday on July 6th! From chart-topping hits to acting, he's done it all. Drop your favourite 50 track!

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th! Send him some Peace & Love for his special day.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: The iconic drummer Ringo Starr turns 86 on Sunday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on vocals or drums?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the inimitable Courtney Love! A true force in rock music. What's your favourite Hole song?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Courtney Love's 62nd birthday this Friday! Her impact on music and culture is undeniable. Crank up some Hole!

moments.title: Bastille Live at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum band Bastille play a huge headline show at Cardiff Castle on Friday, July 10th, with support from Arthur Hill and Sofia Camara.

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Rocks
angles.copy: Bastille are bringing their anthems to Cardiff Castle this Friday! Who's joining them for what promises to be an epic night?

angles.name: Singalong Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for a massive singalong! Bastille play Cardiff Castle this Friday. Expect all the hits and an incredible atmosphere.

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday Mavis Staples
moments.blurb: Legendary American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers, turns 87 on July 10th.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the iconic Mavis Staples on July 10th! A true voice of soul and gospel music.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: The incredible Mavis Staples celebrates her 87th birthday this Friday! Her powerful voice with The Staple Singers shaped generations.

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday Lil' Kim
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and fashion icon Lil' Kim celebrates her 51st birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Queen Bee
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Queen Bee, Lil' Kim, on July 11th! A true hip hop legend and style icon.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating the fierce and fabulous Lil' Kim's 51st birthday this Saturday! Drop your favourite track from the rap superstar!
